text:
Once upon a time there was a bear who really wasn't very clever. Every spring he went looking for nuts to eat, but every time he went into one tree his claws went right through the nuts. So really he was just eating the holes.

On the other hand there was a stupid fox who had a secret love affair with a hare. They would meet at the edge of the Whispering Woods every month. Once they got into the forest their eyes stayed glued together, and they knew every bunny bunny bunny.

They lived happily ever after until every time they got bored they would sneak into Mrs. Willow's garden and eat all her berries.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
